title: 用手机付钱就行
pinyin: Yòng shǒujī fù qián jiù xíng
description_uz: «Hozir tashqariga chiqqanda hamyon olib yurasanmi?» — Ikki do'st elektron to'lov haqida suhbatlashadi: telefonda to'lash, QR-kod skanerlash, parol, to'lov tarixi, xavfsizlik va kichik do'konlar. Bu dialog usulni so'rash, tushuntirish va xavfsizlik maslahatini berishni mashq qiladi. Texnologiyaga oid amaliy so'zlarga boy. Tinglash va rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Ты сейчас берёшь с собой кошелёк, когда выходишь?» — Двое друзей обсуждают электронные платежи: оплату телефоном, сканирование QR-кода, пароль, историю операций, безопасность и маленькие магазины. Диалог тренирует вопросы о способе, объяснение и советы по безопасности. Богат практичной технической лексикой. Отлично подходит для аудирования и ролевой игры.
description_en: «Do you still carry a wallet when you go out these days?» — Two friends discuss electronic payment: paying by phone, scanning a QR code, passwords, transaction records, safety, and small shops. The dialogue practices asking how something works, explaining, and giving safety advice. Rich in practical tech vocabulary. Great for listening and role-play.

sentences.pinyin: Xiànzài chūmén hái dài qiánbāo ma?
sentences.text_translation: Hozir tashqariga chiqqanda hamyon olib yurasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты сейчас берёшь с собой кошелёк, когда выходишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you still carry a wallet when you go out these days?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú dài, yòng shǒujī fù qián jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не беру, плачу телефоном — и всё.
sentences.text_translation_en: No — I just pay with my phone.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Do you use WeChat or Alipay?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Liǎng gè dōu yòng, kàn nǎge fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkalasini ham ishlataman, qaysi biri qulay bo'lsa.
sentences.text_translation_en: I use both — whichever is more convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 怎么付钱？扫一下就行吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zěnme fù qián? Sǎo yíxià jiù xíng ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you pay? Just scan and that's it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，扫二维码，输入密码就可以了。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, sǎo èrwéimǎ, shūrù mìmǎ jiù kěyǐ le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, QR-kodni skanerlab, parolni kiritsang bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, сканируешь QR-код, вводишь пароль — и готово.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right — scan the QR code, enter your password, and you're done.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fù wán yǐhòu yǒu jìlù ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is there a record after you pay?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu, měi yì bǐ dōu néng chádào.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, har bir to'lovni tekshirib ko'rsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes — you can look up every single transaction.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这样安全吗？会不会丢钱？
sentences.pinyin: Zhèyàng ānquán ma? Huì bu huì diū qián?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it safe? Could you lose money?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 安全，但要设好密码，别告诉别人。
sentences.pinyin: Ānquán, dàn yào shè hǎo mìmǎ, bié gàosu biéren.
sentences.text_translation: Xavfsiz, lekin parolni yaxshi qo'yish kerak, boshqalarga aytma.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Безопасно, но нужно поставить надёжный пароль и никому не говорить.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's safe, but set a good password and don't tell anyone.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 小商店也能用电子支付吗？
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎo shāngdiàn yě néng yòng diànzǐ zhīfù ma?
sentences.text_translation: Kichik do'konlarda ham elektron to'lov ishlaydimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В маленьких магазинах тоже можно платить электронно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can small shops use electronic payment too?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 能，现在路边买菜都可以扫码。
sentences.pinyin: Néng, xiànzài lùbiān mǎi cài dōu kěyǐ sǎomǎ.
sentences.text_translation: Ishlaydi, hozir hatto yo'l chetida sabzavot olganda ham kod skanerlasa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно, сейчас даже овощи у обочины можно оплатить, отсканировав код.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes — now you can even scan to buy vegetables at a roadside stall.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 电子支付真的改变了生活。
sentences.pinyin: Diànzǐ zhīfù zhēnde gǎibiàn le shēnghuó.
sentences.text_translation: Elektron to'lov hayotni chindan ham o'zgartirdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Электронные платежи и правда изменили жизнь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Electronic payment has really changed life.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊，连钱包都不用带了。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a, lián qiánbāo dōu búyòng dài le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, hatto hamyon olib yurish ham shart emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, даже кошелёк носить не нужно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah — you don't even need to carry a wallet anymore.
sentences.speaker: B
